title: Fictional Brand Action Campaign Poster AI
sourceTitle: Fictional Brand Action Campaign Poster AI Prompt

imagePrompts.prompt: Platform Goal: Create one image asset for both Pinterest and X. It must work as a Pinterest Pin cover and as an X image-hook post that can anchor a prompt thread. Hero Subject: fictional athletic shoe campaign with runner bursting through graphic color shapes. Scene / Context: urban track at sunrise, bold brand color system, magazine and outdoor print energy. Source Recipe Translation: fictional brand action campaign poster. Preserve these source mechanics: premium high-impact brand campaign poster, action photography fused with bold editorial graphic design. Concrete social variant uses fictional athletic shoe campaign with runner bursting through graphic color shapes in urban track at sunrise, bold brand color system, magazine and outdoor print energy. Composition: vertical 4:5 or 2:3 social-poster composition with a strong central focal subject and clean negative space; Pinterest-first vertical 4:5 or 2:3 unless the source layout requires otherwise; keep the main subject readable in a small thumbnail and center-safe for X crop previews. Style System: premium high-impact brand campaign poster, action photography fused with bold editorial graphic design; polished editorial finish, strong first-glance contrast, clean hierarchy, no raw prompt text shown in the image. Visible Text: NOVA RUN / BUILT FOR MOTION; English-only readable text if text is part of the design; otherwise no visible text. Social Safety and Publishing Constraints: fictionalized social-safe version of the source prompt; adult-safe styling; real brands, logos, teams, and public-figure likenesses replaced with fictional/generic equivalents; no watermark, no random text, no real brand logo, no unauthorized celebrity likeness, no copied IP, no distorted anatomy, no clutter.

imagePrompts.prompt: Platform Goal: Create one image asset for both Pinterest and X. It must work as a Pinterest Pin cover and as an X image-hook post that can anchor a prompt thread. Classification: fictional brand action campaign poster. Hero Subject: fictional outdoor gear brand campaign with adult trail runner bursting through oversized product typography. Scene or Context: misty alpine dawn, wet rocks, dynamic water splash and bold editorial action-poster layout. Composition: vertical 4:5 action campaign poster, subject diagonal motion, huge readable brand word behind, product mark kept fictional; Pinterest-first vertical 4:5 or 2:3 framing unless the source format is essential; keep the main subject readable at thumbnail size and center-safe for X previews. Style Language: high-impact editorial brand campaign poster, cinematic sports lighting, sharp motion energy, polished commercial finish; high-contrast first-glance hook, polished editorial finish, clean visual hierarchy, no raw prompt text shown in the image. Visible Text: RIDGE LINE / MOVE HIGHER; use English-only readable text if text is part of the design, otherwise no visible text. Distribution Fit: Designed for a Pinterest Pin cover and an X image post: strong single-image hook, clear subject, clean crop, readable text, and enough visual value to support a prompt-thread or pin description. Restrictions: fictional brand, no real logo, no unauthorized athlete likeness, no trademarked gear marks, no random text, no watermark; no watermark, no random text, no real brand logo, no unauthorized celebrity likeness, no copied IP, no distorted anatomy, no clutter. Output: one polished finished image, no collage unless explicitly requested, no raw prompt text outside designed typography.
